name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement or report an issue with the documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**Page(s) affected**
Please provide the link(s) to the documentation page(s) that need improvement.

**Description of the issue or improvement**
A clear and concise description of what is wrong, missing, or could be improved.

**Proposed changes (optional)**
If you have a suggestion on how to improve the documentation, please describe it here.
